title: Action plan by priority

priority_definitions.blocker: Must be resolved before any downstream slice consumes the registry as authoritative coverage of product layers.
priority_definitions.major: Should be resolved within the current milestone to bring registry coverage in line with the declared schema layers and source PRD scope.
priority_definitions.minor: Quality-of-life improvements; resolve opportunistically or after BLOCKER/MAJOR items.

items.title: Populate three empty schema layers
items.verification: After regeneration, architecture_graph_report.json reports node_count >= 1 for api-product, legal-evidence, observability-operability; S04 verifier passes.
action: Add at least one data_entity record under legal-evidence (e.g., LegalAct, EvidenceSpan, NormStatement).
Add at least one component record under api-product (e.g., Legal Nexus orchestrator).
Add at least one quality_scenario record under observability-operability (e.g., NFR-7 performance target).
non_claims: Does not assert that one record per empty layer makes the layer complete.
Does not assert that the added records prove product behavior.

items.title: Connect orphan nodes via existing edge types
items.verification: Orphan findings count drops to 0 in architecture_graph_report.json; weakly_connected_components reduces to <= 2.
action: Add EDGE-DEC-D031-HAS-ASSUMPTION-ASSUMP-PRD-SOURCE-TRUTH (has_assumption).
Connect S05-OLD-PROJECT-PRIOR-ART via bounded_by to GATE-G008 or risks to RISK-OVERCLAIM-RUNTIME.
Connect S10-GIGAEMBEDDINGS-CHALLENGER-BLOCKED via bounded_by to GATE-G011.
non_claims: Does not assert that current orphans contain incorrect content.
Does not require using unused edge types as a goal in itself.

items.title: Add explicit proof gates for critical product surfaces with no records
items.verification: architecture_graph_report.json shows new proof_gate records with proof_level=none for generated-Cypher safety, access control, and embedding-model supply chain.
action: Add proof_gate for generated-Cypher safety (no unsafe Cypher execution).
Add proof_gate for access control on Legal Nexus API surface.
Add proof_gate for embedding-model supply-chain integrity.
Link each gate via blocks to REQ-R029 or the corresponding requirement.
non_claims: Does not assert these surfaces are currently unsafe.
Does not commit to implementing the underlying controls in M004.

items.title: Project source PRDs into requirement records
items.verification: Each FR/NFR section in prd/01_general_idea.md, prd/02_architecture.md, prd/03_PRD.md has either a requirement record or an explicit out-of-scope mapping; extractor --check passes.
action: Extend scripts/extract-prd-architecture-items.py mappings to project FR-1..FR-31 and NFR-1..NFR-9.
For each, decide layer placement and add non_claims aligned with R04-INC-007 baseline.
Add evidence records for sibling planning docs (prd/05..10) or document why they are intentionally out-of-scope.
non_claims: Does not assert that 100% PRD projection equals readiness.
Does not require implementing every FR.

items.title: Bridge architecture registry to prd/parser/ evidence
items.verification: At least one evidence record per artifact in prd/parser/ that S05-PARSER-ODT-BOUNDARY currently references only via .gsd/ summaries.
action: Add evidence records anchored to prd/parser/odt_smoke_records.md, prd/parser/parser_staging_graph.md, prd/parser/consultant_relation_candidates.md, prd/parser/source_fixture_inventory.md.
Link via evidenced_by from S05-PARSER-ODT-BOUNDARY and via bounded_by to GATE-G008.
non_claims: Does not assert prd/parser/ files are authoritative.
Does not duplicate their content into the registry.

items.title: Add temporal data_entity and temporal requirement records
items.verification: temporal-model layer has at least one data_entity record plus the existing GATE-G005; node_count for temporal-model >= 2.
action: Add data_entity record for the temporal property bundle (edition_date, valid_from, valid_to, effective_from, effective_to, status, temporal_confidence).
Add requirement records for temporal status semantics anchored to prd/02_architecture.md temporal section.
Link via depends_on from GATE-G005 to the new data_entity.
non_claims: Does not specify temporal storage implementation.
Does not commit to a complete temporal model in M004.

items.title: Tighten anchor stability with line ranges or quote_hash
items.verification: All source_anchors with selector field also carry either line_start/line_end or quote_hash; S04 verifier anchor freshness rules pass.
action: For each GATE-G* record anchored to prd/04_review_findings.md, add line_start/line_end based on current content, or quote_hash of the supporting fragment.
non_claims: Does not assert current selectors fail today.
Does not require removing the selector field.

items.title: Document schema evolution policy
items.verification: README contains a 'Schema evolution' section that specifies parallel acceptance window, extractor migration, verifier behavior on mixed schema_version, and deprecation log location.
action: Add the section to prd/architecture/README.md.
Define how schema_version v2 would be introduced without breaking v1 records during the migration window.
non_claims: Does not require immediate v2 schema.
Does not propose specific v2 fields.

items.title: Disambiguate claims ledger by claim domain
items.verification: claims_ledger.md adds a 'claim domain' column (registry-mechanics vs product) or is split into two derived views.
action: Extend scripts/generate-architecture-views.py to classify each record's claim domain.
Update claims_ledger.md template accordingly.
non_claims: Does not assert current ledger entries are misclassified by safety level.
Does not require ledger schema redesign.

items.title: Consolidate or differentiate health dashboard and architecture report
items.verification: Either architecture_health.md and architecture_report.md have non-overlapping sections, or one is removed with an explicit deprecation note in README.
action: Decide canonical role for each file (technical snapshot vs planning quick-stats).
Update README and the views generator to reflect the decision.
non_claims: Does not require deletion of either file.
Does not propose specific section partitioning.

items.title: Document edge confidence semantics or remove the field
items.verification: README contains an explicit definition of edge.confidence and its relationship (or non-relationship) to item.proof_level.
action: Add a 'Confidence semantics' subsection to README.
If confidence is intended as a separate scalar, document its composition rules with proof_level.
If confidence is redundant, schedule its removal in the v2 schema.
non_claims: Does not assert current confidence values are wrong.
Does not require immediate removal.

items.title: Add CI/regenerate hook documentation
items.verification: README contains a 'Continuous integration' section listing the recommended hook (pre-commit, GitHub Action) and the exact commands.
action: Document the hook recipe in README.

Reference scripts/extract-prd-architecture-items.py --check, scripts/build-architecture-graph.py --check, scripts/verify-architecture-graph.py, scripts/generate-architecture-views.py --check as the gate set.
non_claims: Does not require a specific CI provider.
Does not commit to a specific hook scope.

items.title: Strengthen identifier conventions per record kind
items.verification: Either the schema enforces prefix-by-kind via patternProperties or oneOf with kind-specific pattern, or README documents the prefix convention as a hard contract and the extractor enforces it.
action: Decide between schema-level and extractor-level enforcement.
Add a corresponding test to tests/test_architecture_registry_schema.py.
non_claims: Does not assert current IDs are misclassified.
Does not require renaming existing records.

items.title: Add coverage metrics to views generator
items.verification: architecture_health.md gains a 'Coverage' section showing per-source-file projected/total counts with explicit non_claims that high coverage is not a product readiness signal.
action: Extend scripts/generate-architecture-views.py to compute coverage ratios.
Add non_claims to the new section to prevent overclaim.
non_claims: Does not assert that 100% coverage is the right goal.
Does not assert that coverage equals readiness.

items.title: Connect RISK-OVERCLAIM-RUNTIME to threatened records via risks edges
items.verification: RISK-OVERCLAIM-RUNTIME has at least one outbound risks edge to each record class it threatens (parser, retrieval, generated-Cypher, temporal).
action: Add risks edges from RISK-OVERCLAIM-RUNTIME to the corresponding records.
Use rationale field to explain the surface threatened.
non_claims: Does not assert exhaustive surface inventory.
Does not require linking to every record.

items.title: Either populate or fixture-test contradicts and supersedes branches
items.verification: Either at least one production contradicts/supersedes edge exists with explicit rationale, or tests/fixtures cover both verifier branches with negative and positive cases.
action: Add fixture cases in tests/fixtures/architecture/ for contradicts and supersedes branches.
Confirm verifier behavior matches README documented rules.
non_claims: Does not require introducing real contradictions or supersession in the production registry.
Does not assert that absence of these edges is a current bug.

items.title: Make verifier output state what success does not mean
items.verification: scripts/verify-architecture-graph.py prints, on success, an explicit 'what this does not validate' summary derived from the README boundary statement.
action: Add a final summary block to the verifier CLI output enumerating the surfaces it does not validate.
Mirror the same statement in claims_ledger.md.
non_claims: Does not change verifier scope.
Does not assert any current overclaim by maintainers.

items.title: Document .gsd/ stability assumption or introduce a path-mapping layer
items.verification: README contains an explicit assumption record (or section) about .gsd/ path stability, plus a documented response procedure if .gsd/ is renamed.
action: Add an assumption record (assumption type) anchored to README that .gsd/ paths remain stable for the M004 milestone.
Document the migration response if .gsd/ moves.
non_claims: Does not require building a path-mapping layer.
Does not assert .gsd/ will be renamed.

execution_order_hint: R04-REC-001 (populate empty layers) -> unblocks R04-REC-003, R04-REC-004
R04-REC-002 (connect orphans) -> independent, fast to apply
R04-REC-003 (add critical-surface gates) -> depends on R04-REC-001
R04-REC-004 (FR/NFR projection) -> larger extractor work, depends on R04-REC-001
non_claims: Recommendations are candidate actions, not committed work.
Resolving all items does not constitute product readiness.
Does not assert that the proposed records or edges are exhaustive.
Does not promote any item into architecture_items.jsonl.
